ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code element (e.g., whitespace attribute, standalone attribute) */,
  "to_string" TEXT /* toString() representation of the code element */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the code element (e.g., None, name) */,
  "assignment" TEXT /* Assignment operator used in the code element (e.g., None, =) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the code element (e.g., value, None) */,
  "quote" TEXT /* Quote type used in the code element (e.g., 0, ') */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the file */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the file */,
  "column_number" INTEGER /* Column number in the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_elements_name FOREIGN KEY ("name") REFERENCES attributes ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_elements_quote FOREIGN KEY ("quote") REFERENCES quotes ("type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_elements_assignment FOREIGN KEY ("assignment") REFERENCES assignments ("operator")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "quote" TEXT /* Quote type used in the attribute */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the code element */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the file */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the file */,
  "column_number" INTEGER /* Column number in the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribute was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES code_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_name FOREIGN KEY ("name") REFERENCES empty_attributes ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_name FOREIGN KEY ("name") REFERENCES standalone_attributes ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Assignment operator used */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value assigned */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the code element */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the file */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the file */,
  "column_number" INTEGER /* Column number in the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES code_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of quote used (e.g., single, double) */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the code element */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the file */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the file */,
  "column_number" INTEGER /* Column number in the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quote was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quote was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES code_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standalone_attributes" (
  "standalone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standalone attribute */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the standalone attribute */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the code element */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the file */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the file */,
  "column_number" INTEGER /* Column number in the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standalone attribute was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the standalone attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standalone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standalone_attributes_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES code_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "empty_attributes" (
  "empty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each empty attribute */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the empty attribute */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the code element */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the programming language */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the file */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number in the file */,
  "column_number" INTEGER /* Column number in the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the empty attribute was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the empty attribute was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("empty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_empty_attributes_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES code_elements ("element_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each code element
